'''jasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imaginatively|imaginatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imaginatively|imaginatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jasate|jasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jasatesher|jasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasatesherĂ«m|jasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jasatero|jasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jasateshĂ«|jasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasateshĂ«m|jasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijasatero|gokijasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijasateshĂ«|gokijasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijasateshĂ«m|gokijasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojasankerom|gojasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojasankeshĂ«|gojasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojasankeshĂ«m|gojasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojasankeya|gojasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jasaterom|jasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasatemu|jasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jasateya|jasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijasaterom|gokijasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijasatemu|gokijasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijasateya|gokijasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jasasate|jasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jasasatesher|jasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasasatesherĂ«m|jasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jasasatero|jasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jasasateshĂ«|jasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasasateshĂ«m|jasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijasasatero|gokijasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijasasateshĂ«|gokijasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijasasateshĂ«m|gokijasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojasasankerom|gojasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojasasankeshĂ«|gojasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojasasankeshĂ«m|gojasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojasasankeya|gojasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jasasaterom|jasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jasasatemu|jasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jasasateya|jasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijasasaterom|gokijasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijasasatemu|gokijasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijasasateya|gokijasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠte|jĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠtesher|jĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠtero|jĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠtero|gokijĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠterom|jĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠtemu|jĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠsĂŠteya|jĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠterom|gokijĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠsĂŠteya|gokijĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafsafte|jafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafsaftesher|jafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafsaftesherĂ«m|jafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafsaftero|jafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafsafteshĂ«|jafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafsafteshĂ«m|jafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafsaftero|gokijafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafsafteshĂ«|gokijafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafsafteshĂ«m|gokijafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafsafnkerom|gojafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafsafnkeshĂ«|gojafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafsafnkeshĂ«m|gojafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafsafnkeya|gojafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafsafterom|jafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafsaftemu|jafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafsafteya|jafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafsafterom|gokijafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafsaftemu|gokijafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafsafteya|gokijafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
